## What's changed

A small patch release focused on operational quietness: transient, self-healing infrastructure hiccups no longer look like incidents.

### Fixed
- **Self-healing PostgreSQL reconnects and transient Alertmanager 5xx no longer page.** Dedicated LISTEN connections (WebSocket fanout, snapshot distribution) that get dropped by idle timeouts in the network path now log their immediate reconnect at Info instead of a level that feeds infra alerting. Alert/silence polls retry once on a transient 5xx or transport blip — mirroring the retry the silence write path already had — so a single proxy reset self-heals silently instead of logging a poll failure. A bug where non-2xx read responses lost their status code (making permanent 4xx errors indistinguishable from retryable 5xx) is fixed as part of this.
- **Flaky Codecov PR checks.** Coverage checks ran on Codecov defaults, so sub-percent noise from goroutine timing under `-race` randomly turned PRs red. A `codecov.yml` with sensible thresholds (project: auto ±1%, patch: 70% ±5%) stops the flakiness.

**Full diff:** [v1.9.1...v1.9.2](https://github.com/kj187/jarvis/compare/v1.9.1...v1.9.2)
